ct_merged_biconditional.name: ct_merged_biconditional
ct_merged_biconditional.value: ("canonical_topics"."status" = 'merged' AND "canonical_topics"."merged_into_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("canonical_topics"."status" <> 'merged' AND "canonical_topics"."merged_into_id" IS NULL)

notifications_user_episode_unique_idx.name: notifications_user_episode_unique_idx
notifications_user_episode_unique_idx.where: episode_id IS NOT NULL AND type = 'new_episode'
